MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: RICHARD M LIEBERMAN FOR PLAINTIFF IRENE M LIEBERMAN DBA THE KENMORE
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY ANDREW CATTERALL FOR DEFENDANT DAN SONGGER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF 1570 SUTTER STREET, ROOM 201 OR 216. PLAINTIFF WAIVES RENT, DAMAGES, COSTS AND FEES. LEASE FORFEITED. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT A STAY OF EXECUTION TO 5PM 8/11/05. IF DEFENDANT VACATES ON AGREED DATE, PLAINTIFF TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE WITHIN 7 DAYS. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:JAMES GREEN ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:JOANN BRYCE (218)
